'''鈭歯-dh-n-m''' ('''kanadhnemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:teardown|teardown]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-dh-n-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:teardown|teardown]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-dh-n-m
|-
! Lemma
| kanadhnemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinadhnemoko|thinadhnemoko]] || [[word:jinadhnemoko|jinadhnemoko]] || [[word:shinadhnemoko|shinadhnemoko]] || [[word:kinadhnemoko|kinadhnemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunadhnemoko|thuthunadhnemoko]] || [[word:jujunadhnemoko|jujunadhnemoko]] || [[word:shushunadhnemoko|shushunadhnemoko]] || [[word:kukunadhnemoko|kukunadhnemoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonadhnemoko|thonadhnemoko]] || [[word:jonadhnemoko|jonadhnemoko]] || [[word:shonadhnemoko|shonadhnemoko]] || [[word:konadhnemoko|konadhnemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙nadhnemoko|th忙nadhnemoko]] || [[word:j忙nadhnemoko|j忙nadhnemoko]] || [[word:sh忙nadhnemoko|sh忙nadhnemoko]] || [[word:k忙nadhnemoko|k忙nadhnemoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanadhnemoko|thanadhnemoko]] || [[word:janadhnemoko|janadhnemoko]] || [[word:shanadhnemoko|shanadhnemoko]] || [[word:kanadhnemoko|kanadhnemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanadhnemoko|thanadhnemoko]] || [[word:janadhnemoko|janadhnemoko]] || [[word:shanadhnemoko|shanadhnemoko]] || [[word:kanadhnemoko|kanadhnemoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
